description_long: This is a modern suburban house with a combination of brick and neutral-colored exterior walls, featuring a prominent gable roof and a flat-roofed second-story section. The house is surrounded by a wooden privacy fence and includes a small, landscaped yard with a tree and hedges. Large rectangular windows line the front and side facades, allowing ample natural light into the interior. The main entryway is set back from the street, accessed by a paved walkway and driveway, and is marked by a simple door with a transom window above. The backyard features a patio area and what appears to be a small pool or water feature. The overall design is clean and functional, blending traditional and contemporary architectural elements.
description: A modern brick house with a gable and flat roof, large windows, fenced yard, and a landscaped garden with a patio and pool.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entry door, large windows, and a tree in the landscaped front yard.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the driveway, hedge, and the flat-roofed second story with a rooftop patio.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard, patio area, pool, and the back facade with additional windows.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the fenced yard, tree, and the rear portion of the house with the gable roof.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large rectangular windows
attribute_entryway_design: Simple recessed entry with a single door, transom window, and no porch or decorative columns
